rationale: The Iran-US peace deal momentum is the most relevant new development for Poland, as it could lower energy prices; the Russia-Ukraine war continues without qualitative change.

top_events.title: Iran signals Hormuz reopening tied to peace deal; UAE unlocks frozen funds
top_events.summary: A US-Iran deal edging closer could reduce global energy prices, offering indirect relief to Polish households and industry still exposed to elevated gas and electricity costs.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war continues — no qualitative change
top_events.summary: Fighting on Poland's eastern border persists with no major escalation or breakthrough; security situation unchanged for Polish residents.

top_events.title: EU formally launches accession process for Ukraine and Moldova
top_events.summary: Accession talks continue without new qualitative step this cycle; long-term regional stability implications for Poland remain positive but distant.
